expected_data_points.source_text: Control AC-07 requires administrators to review privileged access every 90 days.
expected_data_points.value: Control AC-07 requires administrators to review privileged access every 90 days.

expected_data_points.source_text: Systems handling audit logs shall retain immutable records for seven years.
expected_data_points.value: Systems handling audit logs shall retain immutable records for seven years.

expected_data_points.source_text: The verification method is quarterly sampling of access tickets and log-retention evidence.
expected_data_points.value: The verification method is quarterly sampling of access tickets and log-retention evidence.

expected_data_points.source_text: Exceptions must be documented with compensating controls approved by the security officer.
expected_data_points.value: Exceptions must be documented with compensating controls approved by the security officer.
